description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means A calls B. platform-api fronts the AI Teammate runtime: it calls ai-agent-svc, which calls workflow-engine (the durable execution / workflow engine in the oncall-ai namespace).

edges.note: durable execution calls; workflow-engine must be up for agent workflows

note: Request flow A->B. Causally, when the callee workflow-engine restarts/refuses connections, ai-agent-svc fails, then platform-api surfaces 5xx. Propagation runs callee -> caller.
